Project Photos

Seeing Water Stains? We Fix Leaks Fast!
(714) 770-4756

Project Overview

Tom and Anna contacted S NEW ROOF after discovering water stains on their ceiling and peeling drywall in their home. Our emergency response team arrived promptly to assess the situation and identify the source of the leak.

The inspection revealed a compromised flashing area around a plumbing vent that had allowed water to penetrate the roof system during recent rains. The water had traveled through the attic space, damaging insulation and eventually causing the visible ceiling damage below.

Our comprehensive repair approach included fixing the roof penetration point with new flashing and sealant, replacing water-damaged insulation in the attic, and restoring the interior ceiling to its original condition. The project was completed in just 2 days with minimal disruption to the homeowners.

Our Leak Repair Process

1

Emergency Inspection

Thorough interior and attic inspection to locate the water infiltration source.

2

Leak Source Identification

Found compromised flashing around plumbing vent allowing water penetration.

3

Roof Repair

New flashing installation with premium sealant and waterproofing membrane.

4

Attic Restoration

Removed wet insulation, treated area for mold prevention, installed new insulation.

5

Interior Repair

Drywall repair, texture matching, and repaint to restore original appearance.

6

Final Testing

Water testing performed to verify complete seal and no remaining leaks.

Project Features

  • Complete Leak Diagnosis
  • New Flashing Installation
  • Premium Waterproofing Sealant
  • Attic Insulation Replacement
  • Mold Prevention Treatment
  • Interior Drywall Repair
  • Texture & Paint Matching
  • 10-Year Warranty on Repair
  • Water Testing Verification
  • Same-Day Emergency Response
